chokri: thá dzɨ mɨ yẽ nū mɨ pù tī ʃī nê mû thə yô ū kō mɨ sɨ kə mə zá â nō hlɨ bâ jō ʃẽ
english: It is said that a long time ago an orphan, a dog and a frog were living together.

chokri: kə mə zá vé rī bâ jō ʃẽ
english: Very happily together, it is said.

chokri: ū kō vô thī zɨ phẽ lɨ bâ â nō kə rɨ thī î nō sɨ bâ jō
english: Usually, before they would go to bed, they would sit at the foot of the bed in deep conversation.

chokri: pù zɨ̄ pù mə yẽ nū lī pū ʃî pū nî zɨ kə bâ tî tʃê thə yô o nō tâ tâ
english: One night while the orphan and his dog were sleeping, the frog ran away.

chokri: kɨ sɨ yā nà mə yə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî tò sɨ pà ʃī zɨ̄ î nō mə yɨ nū nō vô thə yô rɨ thī
english: Usually early in the morning the orphan and his doggy would get up and go talk to the frog.

chokri: sɨ sâ mə yə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî ɨ lɨ kə mə zê sɨ tâ
english: And then the orphan and his doggy suffered deeply.

chokri: ʃī zɨ̄ n̥ tʃê mō tî kō lɨ thə yô phû mɨ dɨ tâ
english: They searched the whole house but the search for Frog found nothing.

chokri: sɨ sâ mə rə nū vô khr kî khá khrī sɨ thə yô thə yô nō dɨ pù tʃê bâ lâ
english: Then the orphan went and opened the window and called Frog Frog where are you?

chokri: tī ʃī nê pū pɨ mə kà ɨ tâ
english: Doggy stuck his head inside the bottle that had been Frog's house.

chokri: bò tō lō pū pɨ mə kà kə bâ tsɨ kə sɨ phá â vâ
english: He fell down and the bottle shattered.

chokri: mə rə nū ō pū ʃī krɨ tsɨ kə tâ pū kî pū ʃī mɨ zà
english: The orphan saw his dog fall jumped from the window and grabbed his dog.

chokri: kə tsá kə tsô vô ō nō thə yô tʃɨ thə yô nō dɨ pù tʃê bâ lâ
english: Next they went to the forest to ask and called Frog frog where are you?

chokri: ʃī zɨ̄ ɨ nō kə tsá mō tî kō lɨ tʃɨ vô
english: And they called like that throughout the whole forest.

chokri: pū nî kə tsá lɨ lɨ kə zɨ tʃê mə khɨ qhô lɨ kə lê tʃê mó
english: Just as they entered the forest they saw a bee hive and a squirrel hole.

chokri: mə rə nū nō tə ʃɨ tʃê pô sɨ nō phê mə khɨ kō tʃê ū kō thə yô mó mē mò sɨ kə tsò sɨ tē
english: The orphan said to the dog to approach the bees and ask them whether they have seen the frog.

chokri: ɨ kā lê kə tsò kə bâ tʃê
english: While I ask the squirrel.

chokri: mə rə nū nō kā lê tʃɨ kə sɨ tʃê kā lê pà mə rə nū kə tsò sɨ mə rē nō nō só pū phû bâ lâ
english: When the orphan called to the squirrel he emerged and asked Orphan for whom are you searching?

chokri: mə rə nū lī kā lê pū nî kə rɨ thī
english: The orphan and the squirrel conversed.

chokri: mə khɨ kō tī ʃī nê khrk sé ɨ mò tâ
english: The bees were very many and that is why they could not hear the doggy's voice.

chokri: sɨ nâ tī ʃɨ n̥ pū lɨ rə dà â nō vô sɨ bô kə nâ sɨ
english: Therefore the dog became angry and went to shake the tree.

chokri: tī ʃī nê nō sɨ bô kə nâ kə sɨ tʃê mə khɨ qhô kà tû tsɨ tʃē dzɨ lɨ kɨ tâ
english: When the doggy shook the tree the bee's nest fell down to the ground.

chokri: mə rə nū sə bô mə lê kū û nō hù tī lī tʃɨ sɨ hmɨ kə zô ō nō tʃê lɨ bâ mē mò lâ
english: The orphan climbed a tree and called to the owl Big-eyed one are you in your house?

chokri: hù tī lī n̥ pū lɨ rə dà sɨ ɨ nō pfɨ pà mə rə nū kə hrê sɨ
english: The owl boiled inside and flew out startling the orphan.

chokri: n̥ā tʃɨ khā kə tsɨ sâ ɨ n̥ zɨ̄ χâ phá vá tò hō
english: If you ever again call me Big-eye like that I will scratch your face to shreds!

chokri: ū kō ɨ lɨ rə dà sɨ tâ
english: During this same time the bees became very angry.

chokri: tī ʃī nê tsɨ hū tē ū kō vô tə ʃɨ hū sɨ
english: Chase this dog! They went to chase the dog.

chokri: mə rẽ nū nō hù tī lī tʃê pô sɨ ā kə dzô vá sɨ tē ɨ n̥ zā kə mò pū sɨ n̥ tʃɨ sá hlò tē hō
english: The orphan said to the owl Owl forgive my fault I will never again call you by a name which is not yours.

chokri: hù tī lī n̥ mə rẽ nū tʃê pô sɨ sɨ sɨ vé
english: Owl replied to the orphan That's okay.

chokri: mə rẽ nū kə tsɨ kə zô pù mə lê kū kə zɨ tʃê pū hò rẽ kə tâ nâ
english: Because he was very tired the orphan climbed a rock and was holding on to a branch.

chokri: ʃī zɨ̄ n̥ pū kə tsɨ pɨ lɨ thà â nō thə yô tʃɨ lâ sɨ
english: And in that way he stood on top of the rock and called again for Frog.

chokri: mə rẽ nū nō sɨ tsô mū n̥ú kə bâ ō tsɨ thə zê kà kə tsɨ sé bâ mò
english: The orphan did not realize that the branch he was leaning on was a deer antler.

chokri: pū thə yô tʃɨ kə sɨ tʃê thə zê hnâ dò lɨ zɨ kə bâ kə rê sɨ mû thɨ zê o nō pū kə rê kə sɨ tʃê hnâ dò lɨ thɨ pā á
english: As he called Frog the deer sleeping in the bush startled and when he leapt out he startled the orphan.

chokri: thə zê thɨ pà kə sɨ tʃê pū kà vô mə rə nū gù ù tâ
english: As the deer leapt out the orphan was hooked on his horn.

chokri: thɨ zê mə rə nū pfɨ ɨ mò zō l nō tâ rə zâ n̥ê lɨ kɨ tâ
english: Without hesitation the deer carried the orphan and ran down to the pond.

chokri: thə zê tâ kɨ rə zâ lɨ kɨ tsò kɨ mə rə nū kɨ thó pū sɨ rə zâ lɨ sɨ sɨ
english: When the deer had reached the lake he jolted the orphan into the lake.

chokri: lâ vô ā mə sɨ lâ khā hɨ thə zê n̥ ʃê sɨ
english: Don't come hassle me ever again shouted the deer.

chokri: ɨ tɨ hù sâ mə rə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî thə yô yw û kə bâ sê
english: After some time the orphan and doggy heard a frog croaking.

chokri: mə rə nū tī ʃɨ tʃê pô sɨ dzɨ kə phà hɨ tē
english: The orphan said to the dog Shh! Don't make any noise.

chokri: mə rə nū lī tī ʃī nê pū nî ɨ rɨ lê mû mū nū sɨ ɨ nō thə yô yw û kə ba tsō pé sɨ
english: The orphan and the doggy slowly and carefully looked towards the frog's croaking.

chokri: pū nî thə yô pù mò lɨ thə yô kə nā zɨ kə sɨ
english: They met not one but two frogs.

chokri: ū kō kə sɨ ɨ nō ū nɨ sɨ kə bâ tî tʃê thə yô zû ū nō thə yô n̥ê kō tʃɨ sɨ mə rə nū lī tī ʃī nê zɨ kə sɨ tē
english: With their meeting they were very happy and the frog mother called the little frogs to come out and meet with the orphan and doggy.

chokri: thə yô n̥ê kə khrō tâ pà â nō tī ʃī nê lɨ mə rə nū pū nî zɨ kə sɨ
english: Many little frogs ran out and met with the doggy and orphan.

chokri: thə yô zû ū nō mə rə nū tʃê pô sɨ mə rə nū ɨ tʃê lɨ lâ vô hlò tē kə krê nâ mò lɨ ā nū n̥ê kō tə khrê bâ mò ō kə sɨ nâ lɨ vê ɨ vô o nō n̥ nɨ ā nū n̥ê pū khā n̥ tsɨ sɨ tò
english: The frog mother said to the orphan because I must care for my children I can never come to the house again but I will give you one of my children and all of you together will live in happiness.

chokri: sɨ sɨ sâ ū kō khɨ khò tâ
english: After that they separated.

chokri: thá dzɨ ao mɨ tʃê dzɨ lɨ rɨ lɨ mɨ kə nā kə mɨ zê sɨ ɨ n̥ hlɨ bâ yō ʃẽ kə krê nâ mò lɨ sɨ rá dzɨ rá hɨ n̥ī hī nō mə rẽ nō mɨ kə tsɨ nâ
english: Long ago in Ao country there were two young women living in much suffering because these two siblings were orphans.

chokri: pū nî zû sā kə tâ sâ ū pō n̥ thə nó kə sâ pù zɨ lâ i tâ
english: After their mother's death their father had received a new woman.

chokri: ū zû kə sâ ō nō rɨ lɨ n̥ī phɨ mō tsɨ rɨ kə tsɨ nâ pū u n̥ vô pū nū pù zɨ kə rə thɨ ɨ nō rɨ lɨ n̥ī hū vá
english: The new mother hated the two girls very much therefore she went and discussed with her husband about chasing them away.

chokri: rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsá lɨ vô tâ
english: The two girls went to the forest.

chokri: rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsá lɨ tɨ sɨ zô kə krô rū hù tâ rɨ ná kə tsɨ pù mó mû pū nî rə ná n̥ê sâ tsô tʃê n̥ê pù thɨ ɨ nō hlɨ sɨ dɨ tâ
english: After walking for many days in the woods the two young girls saw a small village and they built a house behind it and began to live there.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō tɨ tʃê mə tsɨ pū pū hlɨ thɨ kə dẽ vá a nō rɨ ná kō lɨ vô o nō thə mà kō dɨ pù bɨ ɨ n̥ hlɨ bâ sɨ pé sɨ sɨ jō
english: Each year God changed His appearance and went to the villages to see how people were living.

chokri: pù hnā pù kə mə nō pfɨ rɨ ná n̥ê lɨ khrā kə tɨ mɨ dò thɨ ɨ nō tʃê mō tî kō lɨ vô
english: One day God went to the little village pretending to be a beggar going into all the houses.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō tʃê lɨ mō tî kō kə tsò sɨ ā pô nō n̥ê kō tʃê lɨ lɨ vô rɨ lɨ ɨ vé mò lâ
english: God went to all the houses asking for my benefit will you let me in to rest?

chokri: hā kō vò ū nū mɨ nû bâ tē lē sɨ nâ nō m̄ pô hā tʃê lɨ lɨ
english: Our pig is giving birth just now therefore you cannot come in.

chokri: hā vɨ kō kò bâ kə tâ nâ n̥ pô hā tʃê lɨ lɨ vô o sɨ tē hō
english: Our hens are hatching that's why it's not to your benefit to come inside right now!

chokri: sɨ kə hmā â nō mɨ mɨ tî kō pū vā lâ vá
english: In a similar manner all the people repeatedly refused Him.

chokri: sɨ sâ kə mə nō pfɨ nō tà sɨ rɨ lɨ n̥ī tʃê lɨ vô tsō kɨ ɨ tʃê rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsò sɨ n̥ nɨ mə zâ rɨ ā pô tʃɨ zɨ n̥ī kō tʃê lɨ lɨ zɨ vé mē mò lâ
english: After this God walked to the two young ladies house and asked could I sleep in your house tonight?

chokri: rɨ lɨ n̥ī pū tʃê pô sɨ hā n̥ī hmā pù ɨ n̥ tsɨ kə tò bâ mò lē sɨ nâ n̥ pô hā tʃê lɨ lɨ vô kə tò mɨ n̥â lē
english: The young women said we have nothing to give because of this we would be ashamed to have you come into our house.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ pū nî tʃê pô sɨ n̥ pō tsâ a n̥ n̥ nɨ sɨ n̥ī kə bâ mō tɨ bâ sɨ nâ n̥ nɨ ɨ lɨ kə mɨ zê mò ɨ vé ɨ vô o nō n̥ nɨ zɨ hmā tɨ tò
english: God said use your grandfather to have all that you want so that you will no longer suffer I will come to eat with you.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō mē phû phɨ tʃê bâ a nō hmā tsho sɨ dɨ tâ
english: God sat near the fireplace and began to cook something.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ thə hlā sɨ pù pū pɨ pū pà a nō lê lɨ sɨ sɨ ʃī zɨ̄ ɨ nō khū tsɨ tshô ɨ
english: God took a grain of uncooked rice from his head and put it in the pot and cooked rice.

chokri: sɨ sâ pū phê χā sɨ nō hmā pù pū sɨ lê lɨ khā sɨ ɨ tɨ hù sâ thɨ vō thɨ tsho ɨ
english: Next he scratched his leg and put something into a pot and after some time pork was cooking.

chokri: ū kō hmā tɨ tsō kɨ ɨ sâ vô tʃê thô tsō bâ vâ
english: After having finished eating they all went to the back of the house to sit.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ n̥ rɨ lɨ n̥ī kə tsò sɨ hɨ hɨ só pù zɨ lâ lɨ hɨ só pù zɨ lâ ʃī zɨ̄ ɨ n̥ zɨ mō tɨ kō kə tsò sɨ
english: God asked the young women whose field is this whose field is that and asked about all of the fields.

chokri: nā tʃɨ pfɨ kə mə nō pfɨ tʃê pô sɨ zɨ hɨ hɨ ā dzɨ rá pfɨ hā n̥ī zā
english: The younger sister said to God this field belongs to us.

chokri: kə mə nō pfɨ nō sɨ sɨ sê kɨ ɨ tʃê ê dzô pū rə lɨ n̥ī tsɨ sɨ lɨ vê zɨ kə krê mō tî kō rɨ phɨ vá
english: When God heard this he gave a blessing to the young women but he cursed all the other fields.

chokri: tɨ tʃê sɨ hnā rə lɨ n̥ī hmā kə tsâ pù ɨ zɨ ɨ n̥ mò lɨ vê zɨ kə krê mō tî kō kà tâ
english: That year the young women received many things but all the other fields perished.

chokri: rə ná mɨ kō kə mə nō pfɨ kə tsɨ sê kɨ ɨ sâ ɨ lɨ sɨ phɨ tâ
english: After the villagers came to know that had been God their insides became very bad.

Eating vegetables is good for us.

chokri: í pāssə̀-kɘ̄jì lá ā-pɔ̄ hīhī tʰɾı̋ khàɾı̋
english: My father bought me this because I passed my exam.
Close the door.
Do not go there.
If you pass, I will give you this.
If you don't come, I will not give you this.
If you eat food, you would grow more.
If I was rich, I would travel the whole world.

He might have seen me.

Even though the work was difficult, I completed it.
I don't want to eat this.
I want to listen to that song.
Ato is crying.
Ato beat me.
I saw Ato.
Ato hit me with a stone.

Avo bought this for Ato.
I brought this for you.
I chop meat with a machete.

I will wait for you till five o'clock.
We will meet at five o'clock.

Ato went to a shop with the dog.
I am going to go out with my uncle and aunt.
He did not pass because of his laziness.
My father scolded me because of his mistake.
This is Ato's dog.
Avo's shirt is lost.
This is Ato's house.
That person is Ato's relative.
It was Ato.
Ato gave a flower to Avo.
The one who gave a flower to Avo is Ato.

chokri: ʧɛ́ hīhī tʰı̋ tsɔ̄ɔ̀-kɘ̄jì lɘ̄ tɘ́ɾə̄-bɔ̄ tɛ́
english: Upon the completion of this house, it started to rain.
Ato became fat.
It is very hot today.
Your clothes are very beautiful.
Don't be very lazy.

I have started swimming.
I always swim.

I am going to travel next month.
